title: 3 Types Kaju Katli in 10 mins!! 10 मिनट में काजू कतली | Diwali spl Mithai recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: 3 TYPES KAJU KATLI WITH JUST 3 INGREDIENTS - Specially for you all, our 2nd recipe in the Festive series with Nestlé Milkmaid. This Diwali take time out to enjoy the festival..kyunki is baar meetha बनेगा kuch hatke..It's as easy as 1..2..3 ! #collab #Kajukatli #milkmaidkajukatli *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
ingredients: 2 tsp Ghee | 800 gms chilled Cashew nut, powder | 2 tin Nestlé MILKMAID | 260 gms Kaju katli base | ¼ tsp Cardamom powder | 260 gms Kaju katli base | 6-7 no. dry Fig, chopped | 6-7 no. Pistachios (blanched & chopped) | 260 gms Kaju katli base | 50 gms Chocolate, chopped | ¼ cup candied Orange, chopped | ¼ tsp Orange zest, grated | ½ tsp Ghee for greasing tray
instructions: For Kaju Katli Base | In a mixer grinder jar, add chillied cashew nuts and grind it to fine powder. | Sieve the ground cashew nuts powder and keep it aside for further use. | In a kadai or pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add cashew nuts powder and saute it well. | Add Nestlé MILKMAID and cook until it thickens or until it leaves the edges. | Divide the mixture into three equal parts and keep it aside for further use. | For Kaju Katli | In a bowl, add prepared mixture, cardamom powder and mix it well. | Transfer it to a greased tray and spread the mixture evenly with the help of the tray or a spatula. | Add silver vark and keep it in the fridge for 25-30 minutes to set. | Demold the mixture and cut it into the desired shapes. | Transfer it to the serving platter. | For Fig & Pistachios Kaju Katli | In a bowl, add prepared mixture, add figs, pistachios and mix it well. | Transfer it to a greased tray and spread the mixture evenly with the help of the tray or a spatula. | Keep it in the fridge for 25-30 minutes to set. | Demold the mixture and cut into the desired shapes. | Transfer it to a serving platter, garnish it with pistachios and saffron strands. | For Chocolate & Orange Kaju Katli | In a bowl, add prepared mixture, chocolate, candied orange, orange zest and give it a good mix. | Transfer it to a greased tray and spread the mixture evenly with the help of the tray or a spatula. | Keep it in the fridge for 25-30 minutes to set. | Demold the mixture and cut into the desired shapes. | Transfer it to a serving platter, garnish it with candied orange, orange zest and fresh rose petals. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - Pistachios (blanched & chopped) For Garnish Pistachios (blanched & sliver) Saffron strands For Chocolate & Orange Katli 260 gms Kaju katli base 50 gms Chocolate, chopped ¼ cup candied Orange, chopped ¼ tsp Orange zest, grated For Garnish candied Orange, chopped Orange zest, grated fresh Rose petals Other Ingredients ½ tsp Ghee for greasing tray Process For Kaju Katli Base In a mixer grinder jar, add chillied cashew nuts and grind it to fine powder. Sieve the ground cashew nuts powder and keep it aside for further use. In a kadai or pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add cashew nuts powder and saute it well. Add Nestlé MILKMAID and cook until it thickens or until it leaves the edges. Divide the mixture into three equal parts and keep it aside for further use. For Kaju Katli In a bowl, add prepared mixture, cardamom powder and mix it well. Transfer it to a greased tray and spread the mixture evenly with the help of the tray or a spatula. Add silver vark and keep it in the fridge for 25-30 minutes to set. Demold the mixture and cut it into the desired shapes. Transfer it to the serving platter. For Fig & Pistachios Kaju Katli In a bowl, add prepared mixture, add figs, pistachios and mix it well. Transfer it to a greased tray and spread the mixture evenly with the help of the tray or a spatula. Keep it in the fridge for 25-30 minutes to set. Demold the mixture and cut into the desired shapes. Transfer it to a serving platter, garnish it with pistachios and saffron strands. For Chocolate & Orange Kaju Katli In a bowl, add prepared mixture, chocolate, candied orange, orange zest and give it a good mix. Transfer it to a greased tray and spread the mixture evenly with the help of the tray or a spatula. Keep it in the fridge for 25-30 minutes to set. Demold the mixture and cut into the desired shapes. Transfer it to a serving platter, garnish it with candied orange, orange zest and fresh rose petals. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #kajukatlirecipe #kajukatlikaisebanatehain #kajubarfirecipe #diwalimithairecipe

Green chilli, diagonally sliced, हरी मिर्च | ½ tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल | 1 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, roughly chopped, पुदीना पत्ता | 2 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 tsp Oil, तेल | 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस | ½ tbsp Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता | 900 gms Chicken (Drumstick & thigh with bones) चिकन | 1 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक | 7-8 no. Green chilli, diagonally sliced, हरी मिर्च ½ tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल 1 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, roughly chopped, पुदीना पत्ता 2 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस ½ tbsp Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता 900 gms Chicken (Drumstick & thigh with bones) चिकन For Ginger Garlic Paste 1 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक 7-8 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Masala 1 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 2 no. Cloves, लौंग 6-7 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp Dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी For Dahi Wala Chicken 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 3-4 no. Bay leaf, तेज़पत्ता 2-4 no. Cloves, लौंग 2 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2 medium Onion, roughly sliced, प्याज Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन Prepared Ginger Garlic Paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 2-3 cups Curd, beaten, दही 2 tbsp Cashew Nut paste, काजू की पेस्ट For Garnish A pinch of Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला fresh Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता fresh Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Chicken Marination In a bowl, add green chilli, tender coriander stems, mint leaves, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, oil, coriander leaves and chicken. Marinate it well and keep it aside for further use. For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic, green chillies, salt to taste and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Masala In a pan, add black peppercorns, cloves, black cardamom, salt to taste, dry fenugreek leaves and dry roast it for a minute. Keep it aside for further use. For Dahi Wala Chicken In a kadai, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add bay leaves, cloves, black cardamom, cumin seeds and let it splutter. Add onion and saute it for 2-3 minutes until translucent. Add marinated chicken, ginger garlic paste and cook it for a while until tender. Add curd, cashewnut paste and simmer it for a while until thickens. Transfer it to a serving dish and drizzle some prepared masala. Garnish it with coriander sprig and mint sprig. Serve hot with roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #dahiwalachicken #chickenrecipe #ranveerbrar #chickencurry #chickendinner #dahichickenrecipe

Lady finger, cut into half, भिंडी Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तेल For Assembling Prepared Spinach Puree, पालक प्यूरी Kurkuri Bhindi, कुरकुरी भिंडी Prepared Curd, दही तड़का For Garnish Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने Fried dry red chillies, तली हुई सूखी लाल मिर्च Fried Curry leaves, तली हुई करी पत्ता Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Blanching Spinach In a sauce pot, add water, salt to taste and let it boil the water on high flames for 2-3 minutes. Add spinach and simmer for a minute. Strain and transfer the spinach in the ice water to prevent the discoloration. Leave it aside for 2-3 minutes. Transfer the spinach in the mixer grinder jar and grind it to a smooth paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Paste In a Mortar pestle, add garlic, green chillies and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Cooking Spinach In a sauce pot or kadai, add ghee, prepared garlic green chili paste and saute well. Add dill leaves and saute it for 2-3 minutes on medium flames. Add gram flour, salt to taste and cook it well, add prepared spinach puree and saute it well. Add water and simmer it well on low flames. Add black peppercorns, a pinch of sugar, salt to taste, ghee and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Coating Lady Finger In a bowl, add gram flour, rice flour, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, asafoetida and mix it well. Add lady fingers, coat it well and leave it aside for 5-6 minutes. Drop one by one lady finger into hot oil and fry them until they get the nice crispy texture on it. Remove it on absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Curd Mixture In a bowl, add curd, salt to taste, a pinch of sugar, black peppercorns and mix it well. Pour the prepared tadka and mix well. Keep it aside for further use. For Tadka In a small pan, add oil, once it's hot, add dry red chillies, asafoetida, curry leaves, mustard seeds, cumin seeds and let it splutter for 30 seconds on medium flames. Keep it aside for further use. For Batter In a bowl, add gram flour, salt to taste, a pinch asafoetida, degi red chili powder, water and mix everything well. Add lady fingers and coat well and drop into hot oil and fry them until they get the nice crispy texture on it. Remove it on absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Assembling In a serving dish or bowl, add spinach puree, add fried bhindi and add prepared tadka curd. Garnish it with pomegranate pearls, fried dry red chillies, fried curry leaves, lemon wedge and coriander sprig. Serve hot. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #bhindirecipe #dahiwalibhindi #kurkuribhindi #bhindimasala #ranveerbrar #palakpaneer #palakgravy

Green chillies (less spicy & roughly torn) हरी मिर्च 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 2-3 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 1 inch Lemongrass stems (roughly chopped) लेमन ग्रास ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, roughly chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 ½ tbsp Jaggery, roughly chopped, गुड़ For Chicken Marination 450 gms Chicken breast, cut into strips, चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tsp Light soy sauce, सोया सॉस ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tbsp Prepared Curry Paste, तयार किया हुआ करी पेस्ट 1 tbsp Oil, तेल For Peanut Sauce 1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल Prepared Curry Paste, तयार किया हुआ करी पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 cup Peanuts powder, मूंगफली का पाउडर ½ cup Tamarind water, इमली का पानी 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2-3 tbsp Jaggery, roughly chopped, गुड़ 2 cups Water, पानी 2 inch Lemongrass stems, लेमन ग्रास For Salad 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp Vinegar, सिरका ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता ⅓ cup Water, पानी 1 medium Cucumber (peeled & cut into strips) खीरा For Roasting Chicken 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल For Garnish Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Peanut Powder In a pan, add peanuts and dry roast it for a few minutes until golden in color on medium flames. Transfer it to a tray and deskin it by rubbing with the help of hands or with the cloth. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Curry Paste In a medium bowl, add onion, green chillies, ginger, garlic cloves, lemon grass, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin seeds, degi red chili powder, oil, tender coriander stems and jaggery. Transfer it to a grinder jar and grind into a smooth paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Marination In a bowl, add chicken breast, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, light soy sauce, turmeric powder, prepared curry paste, oil and marinate it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Peanut Sauce In a sauce pot, add oil, once it's hot, add prepared curry paste, salt to taste and cook for a while. Add peanut powder and saute well for 2-3 minutes on medium flames. Add tamarind water, degi red chili powder, jaggery, water, lemon grass stems and let it cook it for 10-15 minutes until cooked well. Serve hot with chicken satay. For Roasting Chicken Prick the marinated chicken strips on a wooden skewer, place it on a grill pan and brush it with some oil. Grill it for 2-3 minutes and until golden and flip it on the other side. Drizzle some oil and grill it until tender. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish coriander sprig. Serve hot with Peanut Sauce and some prepared salad. For Salad In a bowl, add green chillies, vinegar, sugar, salt to taste, coriander leaves, water, cucumber and mix well. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickensatay #chickenrecipe #ranveerbrar #sataysauce #peanutsauce #thaipeanutsauce #thaichickensatay #thaichickencurry

Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी For Frying Paneer 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tbsp Ghee, घी 400 gms Paneer, cut diagonally, पनीर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Smoke Coal, कोयला 2-3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 tsp Ghee, घी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता ¼ tsp Prepared Masala, तयार किया हुआ मसाला Process For Gravy In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add cloves, black peppercorns and let it splutter. Add asafoetida, prepared ginger green chili paste and sauté it for 2-3 minutes. Add tomatoes, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder and cook it for a while. Add almonds, curd and cook for 5-6 minutes on high flame. Add water, coriander stems, salt to taste, sugar, cover it with a lid and cook it for 8-10 minutes on medium flame until cooked well. Grind the gravy to a smooth paste with the help of a hand blender, add water and simmer it for a while. Add prepared fried paneer and let it cook for 2-3 minutes. Place the coal in a small bowl, add green cardamom, ghee and cover it with a lid. Keep it aside for 4-5 minutes. Tansfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and sprinkle prepared masala. Serve hot with roti. For Ginger Green Chili Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, green chillies, salt to taste and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Masala In a pan, add salt to taste, black peppercorns, green cardamom and dry roast it for a while. Add dry fenugreek leaves and toss well. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it to a fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. For Smoke Place the coal on a gas range and let it burn on high flame. Place it into a small steel bowl and keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #paneerangara #paneerrecipe #ranveerbrar #restaurantstylepaneerrecipe #angarapaneer #paneermasala

Green cardamom, हरी इलायची Prepared Ginger Garlic Paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 3 medium Onions, chopped, प्याज 1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर Prepared Tomato Paste, टमाटर का पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी Marinated Chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन 1 ½ cups Water, पानी 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Tomato Paste In a chopper, add tomatoes, salt to taste, curd, coriander stems and grind it coarsely. ingredients: 400 gms Paneer, पनीर | ½ tbsp Tender Coriander stems, chopped, धनिया के डंठल | 1 tbsp Schezwan sauce, शेजवान सॉस | ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 inch Ginger (peeled & grated) अदरक | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 3 tbsp Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च | ¼ cup fresh Bread crumb, ब्रेड क्रम्ब | 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल | 1 inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक | 1 ½ medium Onion, diced, प्याज | 1 medium Carrot (peeled & sliced) गाजर | 2 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, broken into half, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च | 1 large Red bell pepper, diced, लाल शिमला मिर्च | 1 large Capsicum, diced, शिमला मिर्च | ¼ cup Spring onion bulb, roughly chopped, हरी प्याज | 1 tsp White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल | ½ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च | Prepared Sauce, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस | ¼ cup Spring onion, roughly chopped, हरी प्याज | 2 tbsp Red chili sauce, रेड चिली सॉस | 1 ½ tbsp Schezwan sauce, शेजवान सॉस | 1 tbsp Green chili sauce, ग्रीन चिली सॉस | 2 tsp Light soya sauce, सोया सॉस | 3-4 tbsp Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप | ½ tsp Brown sugar, optional, ब्राउन शुगर | ½ cup Water, पानी | 1-2 tbsp Cornstarch (for coating) कॉर्नस्टार्च
instructions: For Paneer Balls | In a bowl, add paneer, tender coriander stems, schezwan sauce, degi red chili powder, ginger, salt to taste, cornstarch, bread crumbs and mix it well. | Make lemon size balls, transfer it to a tray, sprinkle some cornstarch and coat it well. | Heat oil in a kadai, place prepared balls and fry it until golden in color. | Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. | For Shanghai Chilli Paneer | In a wok, add oil, once it's hot, add ginger, onion, carrots and saute it for a minute on high flame. | Add dry red chillies, red bell pepper, capsicum, spring onion bulb, white sesame seeds, black peppercorns, shanghai paneer balls and toss it well on high flame. | Add prepared sauce and cook it for 4-5 minutes until thicken. | Finish it with some spring onion and mix it well. | Transfer it to a serving bowl or dish, garnish it with white sesame seeds and coriander sprig. | In a bowl, add red chili sauce, schezwan sauce, green chili sauce, light soy sauce, tomato ketchup, brown sugar, water and mix it well. | Keep it aside for further use. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

https://youtu.be/K16P0U70ZtM Paneer Sizzler - https://youtu.be/Zdu0gLmUHSI Crispy Paneer Balls - https://youtu.be/Ni5d3fFW7nU *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** SHANGHAI CHILI PANEER Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Paneer Balls 400 gms Paneer, पनीर ½ tbsp Tender Coriander stems, chopped, धनिया के डंठल 1 tbsp Schezwan sauce, शेजवान सॉस ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 inch Ginger (peeled & grated) अदरक Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 3 tbsp Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च ¼ cup fresh Bread crumb, ब्रेड क्रम्ब For Shanghai Chilli Paneer 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 1 inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक 1 ½ medium Onion, diced, प्याज 1 medium Carrot (peeled & sliced) गाजर 2 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, broken into half, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 1 large Red bell pepper, diced, लाल शिमला मिर्च 1 large Capsicum, diced, शिमला मिर्च ¼ cup Spring onion bulb, roughly chopped, हरी प्याज 1 tsp White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल ½ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च Fried Shanghai Paneer Balls,तले हुए शंघाई पनीर बॉल्स Prepared Sauce, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस ¼ cup Spring onion, roughly chopped, हरी प्याज For Sauce 2 tbsp Red chili sauce, रेड चिली सॉस 1 ½ tbsp Schezwan sauce, शेजवान सॉस 1 tbsp Green chili sauce, ग्रीन चिली सॉस 2 tsp Light soya sauce, सोया सॉस 3-4 tbsp Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप ½ tsp Brown sugar, optional, ब्राउन शुगर ½ cup Water, पानी Other Ingredients 1-2 tbsp Cornstarch (for coating) कॉर्नस्टार्च Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Garnish White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Paneer Balls In a bowl, add paneer, tender coriander stems, schezwan sauce, degi red chili powder, ginger, salt to taste, cornstarch, bread crumbs and mix it well. Make lemon size balls, transfer it to a tray, sprinkle some cornstarch and coat it well. Heat oil in a kadai, place prepared balls and fry it until golden in color. Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Shanghai Chilli Paneer In a wok, add oil, once it's hot, add ginger, onion, carrots and saute it for a minute on high flame. Add dry red chillies, red bell pepper, capsicum, spring onion bulb, white sesame seeds, black peppercorns, shanghai paneer balls and toss it well on high flame. Add prepared sauce and cook it for 4-5 minutes until thicken. Finish it with some spring onion and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving bowl or dish, garnish it with white sesame seeds and coriander sprig. Serve hot. For Sauce In a bowl, add red chili sauce, schezwan sauce, green chili sauce, light soy sauce, tomato ketchup, brown sugar, water and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chilipaneerrecipe #chillipaneer #ranveerbrar #paneerrecipe #paneermanchurian #chinesestyle #paneerchili #schezwanpaneer

title: Ganpati Spl Modak | उकड़ीचे मोदक बनाने की विधि | Steamed Ukadiche Modak | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: UKADICHE MODAK - From us to you, Happy Ganesh chaturthi. Here's another tribute to the humble Ukadiche Modak *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: 1½ cup Water, पानी | ½ cup Milk, दूध | A pinch Salt, नमक | 1 tbsp Ghee, घी | 2 cups Fine Rice flour, चावल का आटा | 1 tbsp Ghee, घी | 1½ cups Jaggery, गुड | 3 cups Coconut, grated, नारियल | ½ tbsp Poppy seeds, खसखस | 1 tsp Cardamom powder, इलायची पाउडर | ¼ tsp Nutmeg powder, जायफल का पाउडर | 5-6 Cashew nuts, chopped, काजू | 5-6 Almonds, chopped, बादाम | A pinch Saffron, soaked in milk, दूध में भीगा हुआ केसर
instructions: In a kadai, add water, milk and give it a boil. | Add a pinch of salt, rice flour, ghee and make a soft dough. | Whisk it with the help of a rolling pin and mix it well. | Cover it with a lid and cook on low heat for 5 minutes. | Transfer it to a parat, add ghee and knead it well. | Keep it aside for further use. | For Stuffing | In a pan, add jaggery and cook for 3-4 minutes until it melts on medium flame. | Add grated coconut, poppy seeds, cardamom powder, nutmeg powder, cashewnut, almonds and mix it well. | Cook it for 4-5 minutes or until the mixture is dry. | Transfer it to a tray and let it cool at room temperature. | For Ukadiche Modak | Take a lemon sized dough, spread it with the finger or roll it with a rolling pin. | Place the mixture in the center, pinch the edges to create the pleats and close the edges. | Heat the water in a steamer, place the prepared modak and add some saffron milk on top of the modak. | Cover it with the lid and cook it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. | Transfer it to a serving dish and serve hot. | ************************ | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar | Video footages crtsy: | 1. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iwTavEMaiQE | Channel: youtube.com/@VakratundayaFilms | Befocused Production Films | Shot by :- VIJAY BORKAR FILMS | 2. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WnHUE7CAwxw | youtube.com/@shlokcreation6776 | 3. https://youtube.com/watch?v=rxLoQ_phZZk | youtube.com/@VishwaShetty | 4. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sV7prEVJU44&t=428s | youtube.com/@MumbaiChaGanpati

Add a pinch of salt, rice flour, ghee and make a soft dough. Whisk it with the help of a rolling pin and mix it well. Cover it with a lid and cook on low heat for 5 minutes. Transfer it to a parat, add ghee and knead it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Stuffing In a pan, add jaggery and cook for 3-4 minutes until it melts on medium flame. Add grated coconut, poppy seeds, cardamom powder, nutmeg powder, cashewnut, almonds and mix it well. Cook it for 4-5 minutes or until the mixture is dry. Transfer it to a tray and let it cool at room temperature. For Ukadiche Modak Take a lemon sized dough, spread it with the finger or roll it with a rolling pin. Place the mixture in the center, pinch the edges to create the pleats and close the edges. Heat the water in a steamer, place the prepared modak and add some saffron milk on top of the modak. Cover it with the lid and cook it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. Transfer it to a serving dish and serve hot. ************************ 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar Video footages crtsy: 1. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iwTavEMaiQE Channel: youtube.com/@VakratundayaFilms Befocused Production Films Shot by :- VIJAY BORKAR FILMS 2. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WnHUE7CAwxw youtube.com/@shlokcreation6776 3. https://youtube.com/watch?v=rxLoQ_phZZk youtube.com/@VishwaShetty 4. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sV7prEVJU44&t=428s youtube.com/@MumbaiChaGanpati #ukadichemodak #modakrecipe #ranveerbrar #modakfilling #modakkaisebanaye #howtomakemodak #kozhukattairecipe #modakrecipemarathi

description: AIRFRYER MODAK - Are you all set to welcome Bappa? If you are looking for some guilt-free indulgence, try this Jhatpat Modak in Philips Airfryer. Check out the link below to buy.. #collab #Modakrecipe #ganeshchaturthi *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
ingredients: 1 cup fresh Coconut, grated | 3-4 Cashew nuts, chopped | 3-4 Almond, chopped | 1 tbsp Sesame seeds | ¾ cup Jaggery, grated | ¼ tsp Cardamom powder | 1 cup Whole wheat flour | Salt to taste | 1 tsp Powdered sugar (optional) | ¼ cup Ghee
instructions: For Stuffing | Preheat the airfryer for 5 minutes at 180°c. | In a baking tray, add fresh coconut, cashew nuts, almonds, sesame seeds and mix it well. | Place in the airfryer and toast for 3-4 minutes at 180°c. | Transfer it to a bowl, add jaggery, cardamom powder and mix it well. | Keep it aside for further use. | In a parat, add whole wheat flour, salt to taste, powdered sugar, ghee, water and knead it into a stiff dough. | Keep it aside for 10 minutes to rest. | Divide the dough into equal sized balls and flatten it with the help of a rolling pin. | Apply water on the edges. | Place the filling onto the sheet and give it the desired shape. | Preheat the airfryer for 5 minutes at 185°c | Place the modak into the airfryer, apply ghee onto the modak and cook it for 10-12 minutes at 185°c | Transfer it into the serving dish and serve hot. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

In a baking tray, add fresh coconut, cashew nuts, almonds, sesame seeds and mix it well. Place in the airfryer and toast for 3-4 minutes at 180°c. Transfer it to a bowl, add jaggery, cardamom powder and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Modak In a parat, add whole wheat flour, salt to taste, powdered sugar, ghee, water and knead it into a stiff dough. Keep it aside for 10 minutes to rest. Divide the dough into equal sized balls and flatten it with the help of a rolling pin. Apply water on the edges. Place the filling onto the sheet and give it the desired shape. Preheat the airfryer for 5 minutes at 185°c Place the modak into the airfryer, apply ghee onto the modak and cook it for 10-12 minutes at 185°c Transfer it into the serving dish and serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Dryfruitsmodak #modakfilling #coconutmodak #modakrecipemarathi #modakreciperanveerbrar

raw_text: PURAN POLI - Filling sahi to dish sahi. And for a 'Sahi' Puran Poli filling I trust Tata Sampann's Unpolished Chana Dal. Ab jaldi recipe dekh leejye.. Bappa is waiting :) #collab #Puranpoli #Ganeshchaturthi *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/FestiveRecipesbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** PURAN POLI Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 30-40 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Dough 2 cups Refined flour, मैदा 1 cup Whole wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Water as required, पानी ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 ½ tsp Oil (for finishing) तेल For Cooking Dal 2 cups Chana dal (soaked for 4-5 hrs) चना दाल 5-6 cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर For Vatan ¼ cup Oil, तेल 2 large Onions, sliced, प्याज 2 Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, roughly chopped, धनिया के डंठल ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced) अदरक 2-4 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ cup Dry coconut, grated, सूखा नारियल 1 tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 heaped tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 5-6 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 3-4 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 5-6 no. Cloves, लौंग 1 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने For Katachi Amti Remaining lentil water, बचा हुआ दाल का पानी ½ cup Cooked dal, पकी हुई चना दाल Prepared Vatan, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Tadka 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 2 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते 1 ½ tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ cup Water, पानी 1 heaped tbsp Tamarind pulp, इमली का गूदा 1 tbsp Jaggery, गुड़ For Puran 2 cups Cooked dal 1 ½ cups sugarcane Jaggery 1 tbsp Ghee 1 tbsp Ghee (Optional) घी ¼ tsp Cardamom powder ¼ tsp Nutmeg powder 1 tbsp Ghee (for finishing) Other Ingredients 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 1-2 tsp Ghee (for roasting) घी Process For Dough In a parat, add refined flour, whole wheat flour, salt to taste, water, turmeric powder, oil and knead it to semi soft dough. Apply oil onto the dough and keep it aside for further use. For Cooking Dal In a pressure cooker, add chana dal, water, salt to taste, oil, turmeric powder and mix it well. Cover it with the lid and cook till 3-4 whistles or until cooked well. Strain the water, mash the cooked chana dal with the help of the strainer and keep it aside for further use. For Vatan In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add onions, green chillies, coriander stems, ginger, garlic, salt to taste and saute it for 2-3 minutes until the onions are translucent. Add dry coconut, saute it for a minute and transfer it to a tray. In the same pan, add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, green cardamom, cinnamon stick, cloves, bay leaf, black peppercorns, dry roast it for a minute and transfer it in the same tray. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Katachi Amti In a handi, add remaining dal water, cooked dal, prepared vatan and mix it well. Cook it for 10-12 minutes on low to medium flame. Add prepared tadka and let it simmer for a while. Finish it with some coriander leaves and transfer it to a serving bowl. Serve hot along with prepared puran poli, ghee and jaggery. For Tadka In a pan, heat oil, add curry leaves, degi red chili powder and saute for a minute. Add water, tamarind paste, jaggery and let it cook until jaggery melts. Keep it aside for further use. For Puran In a kadai, add cooked dal, jaggery, ghee and cook it for 15-20 minutes or until thickens on medium flame. Transfer it on the strainer and strain it well for a smooth mixture. Add ghee, cardamom powder, nutmeg powder, ghee and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Roasting Puran Poli On a table top, apply a generous amount of oil, take the small ball of dough and spread it evenly. Stuff with the prepared mixture and close the edges. Spread the puran poli gently with the help of hands and keep it aside for further use. In a tawa, heat ghee, place prepared poli and cook well on both sides until it's golden in color. Transfer it to a serving dish, serve along with prepared katachi amti, ghee and jaggery. Serve hot. *********************** #Puranpolirecipe #Khatachiaamti #Ranveerbrar

Soaked Bitter gourd, भीगे हुए करेला 2-3 tbsp Water, पानी For Masala Stuffing ¼ cup Ghee, घी 1 ½ inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक 10-12 no. Onions, chopped, प्याज ¼ cup Bitter gourd skin (soaked & chopped) करेला के छिल्के Prepared Besan Mixture, तयार किया हुआ बेसन का मिश्रण Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 ½ tsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर For Besan Mixture ¼ cup Ghee, घी 1 tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 2 heaped tbsp Gram flour, बेसन 1 tbsp Raisins, chopped, किशमिश ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर For Curd Mixture 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 ½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही For Bharwa Karela ¼ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल Prepared Curd Mixture, तयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण Stuffed Karela, भरवा करेला Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Garnish Tomato, wedges, टमाटर Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Kaadha In a saucepan, add bitter gourd skin, water, jaggery, ginger, fennel seeds, carom seeds, salt to taste, ghee and stir it well. Boil for 10-12 minutes at low flame. Pour it in a serving cup, add lemon juice and mix it well. Serve hot. For Soaking In a bowl, add salt to taste, turmeric powder, water and mix well. Add bitter gourd, bitter gourd skin and soak it for a while. For Sauteing Karela In a handi or kadai, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add soaked bitter gourd and saute it for a minute. Add water and cover it with the lid and cook it for 7-8 minutes or until half cooked on medium flame. Transfer it to a tray or plate and keep it aside for further use. For Masala Mixture In a handi or kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add ginger, onions and cook it until translucent. Add bitter gourd skin and cook it for 4-5 minutes or until golden in color. Add prepared besan mixture and saute it well. Add salt to taste, dry mango powder and give it a good mix. Transfer it to a tray or plate and keep it aside to cool at temperature. Take sauteed karelas and stuffed with prepared masala mixture. Seal the edges with thread and keep it aside for further use. For Besan Mixture In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add fennel seeds and let it splutter. Add gram flour, raisins and cook for a minute. Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Curd Mixture In a bowl, add degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, a pinch of asafoetida, curd and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Bharwan Karela In a kadai, heat mustard oil, add prepared curd mixture and cook it for 2-3 minutes. Place stuffed karela, add salt to taste, cover it with the lid and cook it for 10-12 minutes on low flame. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with tomato wedges and coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #bharwaKarelarecipe #StuffedKarela #ranveerbrar #bharwankarela #punjabibharwaankarela

Divide it into 3 bowls equally and keep it aside for further use. Red Velvet Modak In a bowl, add prepared modak base, beetroot juice, desiccated coconut, Nestlé MILKMAID and make a soft doughy mixture. Take a modak mold, stuff with the prepared modak mixture and make a cavity in the middle. Stuff the modak with white chocolate and close the edges. Scrape out the excess mixture and press the mold well to get the perfect shape. Demold the modak and transfer it to a serving dish. Garnish it with icing sugar and desiccated coconut. For Chocolate Modak In a bowl, add prepared modak base, cocoa powder, Nestlé MILKMAID and make a soft doughy mixture. In a bowl, add tutti frutti, milk powder and mix it well. Take a modak mold, stuff with the prepared modak mixture and make a cavity in the middle. Stuff the modak with the prepared tutti frutti filling and close the edges. Scrape out the excess mixture and press the mold well to get the perfect shape. Demold the modak and transfer it to a serving dish. Garnish it with melted white chocolate and cocoa powder. For Kesar Pista Modak In a bowl, add prepared modak base, saffron water, Nestlé MILKMAID, cardamom powder, almond powder, cashewnut powder and make a soft doughy mixture. Take a modak mold, stuff with the prepared modak mixture and make a cavity in the middle. Stuff the modak with the prepared stuffing and close the edges. Scrape out the excess mixture and press the mold well to get the perfect shape. Demold the modak and transfer it to a serving dish. Garnish it with silver vark, saffron strands and pistachios. For Stuffing In a pan, heat ghee, add pistachios, almonds, cashewnut and toss it for a minute. Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. Tips to Make Red Velvet Modak Use beetroot puree to make it more flavourful. Tips to Make Chocolate Modak Use 70% of desiccated coconut and 30% of cocoa powder. Tips to Make Kesar Pisata Modak To enhance the flavor, use freshly ground cardamom powder for more aromatic and flavourful modaks. Grease the mould with ghee to prevent sticking. Toast the nuts in ghee to prevent off aromas. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Add french beans, sweet corn, carrot, salt to taste, and saute it for a while on high flame. Add schezwan sauce and mix it well. Add soya granules, water and cook it for 2-3 minutes on high flame. Add potatoes, schezwan sauce, tender coriander stems, mash it well and cook for 4-5 minutes on high flame. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside to cool at room temperature. Take a spoonful of mixture, insert an ice cream stick and give it a lollipop shape or any desired shape. Keep it aside for further use. For Slurry In a bowl, add refined flour, cornflour, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, schezwan sauce, ginger garlic paste, water and make a thick smooth batter. Keep it aside for further use. For Frying In a tray, add refined flour, place prepared lollipops and dry coat it well. Dip the lollipops in prepared slurry and drop it in hot oil. Fry it for 4-5 minutes until crispy. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with schezwan sauce. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #veglollipop #vegcutlets #ranveerbrar #snackrecipe #kidssnacksrecipe #cutletrecipe #chickenlollipop

Garlic cloves, लहसुन For Gravy 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 no. Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता Prepared Ginger Garlic Paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 2 large Onions (diced & optional) jiप्याज 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग 1 ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 4-5 medium Tomatoes, diced, टमाटर 2 cups Water, पानी 8-10 no. Cashewnut, काजू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 tbsp Ghee, घी ½ cup Water, पानी 1 tbsp Ghee, घी ½ tsp Dry fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी For Sauteing Vegetables 1-2 tsp Oil, तेल 1-2 tsp Ghee, घी ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & diagonally sliced) हरी मिर्च 2 medium Carrots (peeled & julienned) गाजर ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 small Cabbage, shredded, पत्ता गोभी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार A pinch of asafoetida, हींग ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 no. Capsicum, sliced, शिमला मिर्च 1 no. Red bell pepper, sliced, रेड बेल पेपर 8-10 no. French beans, diagonally sliced, फ्रेंच बींस 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & diagonally sliced) हरी मिर्च Other Ingredients Processed cheese, grated, चीज For Garnish Fresh cream (for finishing) ताज़ा मलाई Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Processed cheese, grated, चीज Process For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Gravy In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, prepared ginger garlic paste, onions and saute it until translucent. Add coriander powder, asafoetida, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder and cook it for 2-3 minutes on medium flames. Add tomato and mix it well, add water, cashewnut, salt to taste, sugar, ghee and let it simmer for a while. Cover it with the lid and cook for 10-15 minutes until cooked well. Grind the gravy to a smooth paste with the help of a hand blender. Add water, ghee and give it a quick boil. Finish it with some dry fenugreek leaves and mix well. Keep it aside for further use. For Sauteing Vegetables In a kadai, add oil & ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, green chillies and let it splutter. Add carrots, sugar, salt to taste and cook it until half cooked. Add cabbage, salt to taste and mix well. Cover it with a lid and cook until it leaves its moisture. Add asafoetida, degi red chili powder and saute it well. Add capsicum, red bell pepper, french beans and cook it for 4-5 minutes. Finish it with some coriander leaves, green chillies and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Assembling In a serving bowl or dish, pour prepared gravy, add cheese and top it up with prepared sauteed vegetables. Garnish it with coriander sprig and cheese. In another bowl or dish, pour prepared gravy and top it up with prepared sauteed vegetables. Garnish it with fresh cream and coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar 🎼 from @hoopr Get yours now! #Vegchillimilli #mixedvegrecipe #ranveerbrar #restaurantstylemixveg #hoteljaisemixedveg #chillimilli

Garlic cloves, लहसुन 1 medium Onion, sliced, प्याज 2 medium Carrots (peeled & roughly chopped) गाजर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी 10-12 medium Tomatoes, cut into half, टमाटर 4-5 cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2-3 tbsp Extra virgin olive oil (for finishing) जैतून का तेल For Blanching Cashewnut ½ cup Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ cup Cashew Nut, काजू For Basil Pesto ½ cup Cashew Nut, blanched, काजू 7-8 no. For Garlic Green Chilli Paste In a mortar pestle, add green chillies, garlic and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Vada Mixture In a bowl, add boiled potatoes and mash it well, add prepared garlic green chili paste and give a good mix. Add prepared tadka, salt to taste, green chillies, coriander leaves and mix it well. Give it a desired shape and keep it aside for further use. Dip the prepared vada in the batter and coat it well. Place the vada into medium hot oil and fry until golden brown. Keep it aside for further use. Transfer it to a tray, add garlic clove, degi red chili powder, transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it coarsely. Add salt to taste, fried besan crumbs and grind. Transfer it to a tray or plate and keep it aside for further use. For Toasting Buns In a tawa, add butter, place burger buns and toast it well. Transfer it to a plate and keep it aside for further use. For Fried Chillies In a tawa, heat oil, butter, add green chillies and roast it for a minute. Sprinkle salt to taste and transfer it to a tray. Keep it aside for further use. For Assembling In a toasted burger bun, spread butter, green chutney, add fried besan crumbs, place fried vada, cheese slice, add prepared dry garlic chutney, fried chillies and close it with another slice of bun. Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन 1 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक 1 no. Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता ¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 5-6 small White onion, sliced, सफेद प्याज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 cups Curd, beaten, दही 8-10 no. Cashew Nuts, blanched, काजू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 ½ cups Water, पानी 1 cup Water, पानी 1 no. Green chili, slit into middle, हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी For Masala Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 1 tbsp Dry fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी For Sauteing Eggs 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 ½ tsp Caraway seeds, शाही जीरा 7-8 no. Eggs (hard boiled) उबले हुए अंडे ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, chopped, धनिया के डंठल For Garnish Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला Chili oil, मिर्च का तेल Fresh cream (for finishing) ताज़ा मलाई Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Gravy In a handi, heat ghee, oil, add garlic, ginger and saute it for 2-3 minutes on medium flame. Add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, onion, salt to taste and cook it for 5-6 until translucent on medium flame. Add curd and cook it well for a while. Add cashew nuts, salt to taste, water and let it simmer, grind it into smooth paste with the help of a hand blender. strain the gravy, add water, green chili, salt to taste, sugar and let it simmer until thick. Transfer it to a serving dish or bowl and place prepared sauteed eggs. Garnish it with prepared masala, chili oil, fresh cream and coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti. For Masala In a pan, add salt to taste, black cardamom, black peppercorns, dry fenugreek leaves and dry roast for 2-3 minutes on medium flame. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. For Sauteing Eggs In the same pan, heat ghee, oil, add caraway seeds and let it splutter. raw_text: KOTHIMBIR VADI - A traditional Maharashtrian and Gujarati snack, but I have my own selfish reasons for making this..Dhaniya!!! :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/PakodaBhajiyarecipes *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** KOTHIMBIR VADI Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Steamed Kothimbir Vadi (Home Style) 2 cups Gram flour, बेसन ¼ cup Rice flour, चावल का आटा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी 2 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Garam masala (optional) गरम मसाला A pinch of asafoetida (optional) हींग ½ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed (optional) कुटी काली मिर्च ¼ cup Curd, beaten, दही ⅓ cup Water, पानी 1 tsp white Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल 1 cup Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 ½ tsp Oil, तेल For Cooked Kothimbir Vadi 2 cups Gram flour, बेसन ¼ cup Rice flour, चावल का आटा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tsp Sugar, चीनी 2 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Garam masala (optional) गरम मसाला A pinch of asafoetida (optional) हींग ½ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed (optional) कुटी काली मिर्च ¼ cup Curd, beaten, दही 4 ½ cups Water, पानी 2-3 tsp Oil, तेल 1 cup Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp white Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल ½ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed (optional) कुटी काली मिर्च 2 no. Green chili (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च For Chutney ⅓ cup Tender Coriander stems, धनिया के डंठल 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 2 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 2-3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & broken into half) हरी मिर्च 2-3 tsp Oil, तेल 1 medium raw Mango (peeled & roughly chopped) कैरी ¼ cup fresh Coconut, roughly chopped, (optional) नारियल For Tempering 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, सरसों के बीज 2 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते Other Ingredients Oil for greasing, तेल white Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल Oil for shallow fry, तेल तलने के लिए For Garnish Prepared Tempering, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Steamed Kothimbir Vadi (Home Style) In a bowl, add gram flour, rice flour, salt to taste, sugar, ginger garlic paste, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, garam masala, asafoetida, curd, water, white sesame seeds, coriander leaves and make a semi soft dough. Add oil and mix it well. Keep it aside to rest for 8-10 minutes. Take a dish or plate and grease it with oil. Apply water on the palms, transfer it to a tray and spread it evenly. Sprinkle some sesame seeds and transfer it to a steamer, cover it with the lid and cook it for 15-20 minutes on medium flame. Keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. Demold the kothimbir vadi and cut it into pieces. Heat oil in a kadai, add kothimbir vadi and fry until golden brown. Transfer it to a serving dish and finish it with prepared tadka. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve with prepared chutney. For Cooked Kothimbir Vadi In a bowl, add gram flour, rice flour, salt to taste, sugar, ginger garlic paste, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, garam masala, asafoetida, crushed black peppercorns, curd, water and make a lumps free batter. Add oil and mix it well. In a kadai, add the mixture and cook it until it thickens on medium flame. Add coriander leaves, white sesame seeds, crushed black peppercorns and cook it for 4-5 minutes until it leaves the edges. Add green chillies and mix it well. Transfer it to a greased tray and spread it evenly. Transfer the tray into the refrigerator and let it set aside for a while. Demold the kothimbir vadi and cut it into pieces. In a kadai, heat oil, add kothimbir vadi and shallow fry until golden brown. Transfer it to a serving dish and finish it with prepared tadka. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve it with prepared chutney. For Chutney In a mixer grinder jar, add tender coriander stems, sugar, ginger, garlic, green chillies, oil, raw mango, fresh coconut and grind it into a smooth paste. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #kothimbirwadi #snackrecipe #ranveerbrar #maharashtriankothimbirvadi

Here's my recipe to try it at home. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/ChaatRecipesbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** RAGDA CHAAT Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Ragda 2 cups White chana (soaked for 8-10 hours) सफेद वटाना 4 medium Potatoes (peeled & cut into half) आलू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी ¼ cup Ghee, घी 1 Green chili, broken into half, हरी मिर्च 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 3 no. Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता 4 cups Water, पानी Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी For Tomato Chutney 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक ½ tsp Asafoetida, हींग 5 medium Tomatoes, roughly chopped, टमाटर 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 tbsp Vinegar, सिरका Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 cup Water, पानी ½ cup Water, पानी For Chaat Masala Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 heaped tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिया के बीज 1 tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 1 tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची ½ tsp Asafoetida, हींग 2 tsp Dry mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी For Tadka 2 tbsp Ghee, घी ½ tsp Asafoetida, हींग ½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 3 no. Green chilies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च For Assembling Prepared Ragda, तैयार किया हुआ रगड़ा 7-8 no. Puri, पूरी Prepared Chat Masala, तैयार किया हुआ चाट मसाला 2 no. Green chilies, chopped, हरी मिर्च Coriander leaves, धनिया पत्ता ½ inch Ginger (peeled & julienned) अदरक Prepared Tomato chutney, टमाटर की चटनी Green chutney, हरी चटनी Sweetened curd, दही Onion, chopped, प्याज Prepared Chat Masala, तैयार किया हुआ चाट मसाला Prepared Ragda, तैयार किया हुआ रगड़ा Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Ratlami sev, रतलामी सेव semi ripe Raw mango, chopped, कच्चा आम Nylon sev, नायलॉन सेव Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने Potato wafers, आलू वेफर Green chilies, chopped, हरी मिर्च Ginger (peeled & julienned) अदरक Lemon wedges, नींबू की फांक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Ragda In a pressure cooker, add white chana, potatoes, salt to taste, sugar, ghee, green chili, turmeric powder, asafoetida, degi red chili powder, bay leaf, water and cook it for 3-4 whistles or until cooked well. Add prepared tadka and finish it with some ghee. Mash the ragda with the help of a masher and simmer it for 7-8 minutes on medium flame. Keep it aside for further use. For Tomato Chutney In a pan, heat oil, add ginger, asafoetida, tomatoes and toss it for a minute. Add degi red chili powder, vinegar, salt to taste, sugar and saute it well. Add water and cook it for 7-8 minutes or until cooked well on medium flame. Grind the chutney into smooth paste with the help of a hand blender, add water and simmer it for a minute. Strain the chutney and transfer it to a bowl. Keep it aside to cool at room temperature. For Chaat Masala In a pan, add salt to taste, coriander seeds, fennel seeds, cumin seeds, black peppercorns, green cardamom, asafoetida and dry roast it for 2-3 minutes on low flame. Transfer it to a tray, add dry mango powder, sugar and let it cool down to room temperature. Transfer it to a grinder jar and grind into a coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Tadka In a non-stick pan, add ghee, once it is hot, add asafoetida, ginger, green chili and saute on low to medium flame for 2-4 minutes. Keep it aside for further use. For Assembling In a serving dish, add prepared ragda, sprinkle some prepared chat masala, add green chilies, coriander leaves, ginger, prepared tomato chutney, green chutney, sweetened curd, onion, nylon sev, ratlami sev, raw mango, pomegranate pearls, potato wafers, green chilies and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #ragdachaat #ragdapuri #ranveerbrar #ragdarecipe #ragdapattiesrecipe #streetfood #chaatrecipes #ghugnichaat

ingredients: 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल | ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, सरसों के बीज | ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ | 2 no. Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च | 2 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ता | ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | A pinch of asafoetida, हींग | 3 cups thick Poha, पोहा | Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का | ½ tbsp Sugar, चीनी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 tbsp Milk, दूध | 2-4 no. raw_text: INDORI POHA - If you have visited or even heard about Indore street food, then this recipe is for you.. And if you haven't, then you MUST definitely try it :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Kanda Poha - https://youtu.be/LAcFkm5Soq8 Fafda - https://youtu.be/gNWW_46qJFA Jalebi - https://youtu.be/EiPZe0K9Q2E *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** INDORI POHA Preparation time 5-10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Tadka 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, सरसों के बीज ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 2 no. Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च 2 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ता ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग For Indori Poha 3 cups thick Poha, पोहा Water, पानी Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का ½ tbsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp Milk, दूध Other Ingredients Water, पानी 2-4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & slit into half) हरी मिर्च For Jeeravan Masala 1 tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 3 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिया के बीज 1 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 6-7 no. Cloves, लौंग 1 no. Mace, जावित्री ¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 6-7 no. Bay leaf, तेज़पत्ता 10-12 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 3-4 no. Dry kashmiri red chillies (broken into half) सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च ¼ Nutmeg, जायफल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tsp Pink salt, काला नमक 2 tsp Ginger powder, सोंठ पाउडर A pinch of turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग For Masala Peanuts 2-3 tsp Oil, तेल ½ cup Peanuts, मूंगफली ¼ tsp Degi red chili powder, दगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Garnish Prepared Poha, तयार किया हुआ पोहा Masala Peanuts, मसाला मूंगफली Green chili, less spicy & slit into half, हरी मिर्च Ratlami sev, रतलामी सेव Masala Boondi, बूंदी Nylon sev, नायलॉन सेव Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने ½ tsp Prepared Jeeravan Masala, तैयार किया हुआ जीरावन मसाला Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Jalebi, जलेबी Process For Indori Poha In a bowl, add thick poha, water and rinse it. Strain the water and keep it aside for further use. For Tadka In a pan, heat oil, add mustard seeds, cumin seeds, fennel seeds and let it splutter. Add green chillies, curry leaves and toss it well, turn off the flame, add turmeric powder, asafoetida and mix it well. Pour the Prepared tadka on the soaked poha, add sugar and give it a good mix. Add a little milk and mix well. Keep it aside for further use. For Steaming Poha In a kadai, add water and place a plate on top of the kadai. Add prepared poha, green chillies and let it steam for at least 15-20 minutes on moderate heat. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with masala peanuts, green chillies, ratlami sev, masala boondi, nylon sev, pomegranate pearls, sprinkle prepared jeeravan masala, coriander leaves and lemon wedges. Serve hot with jalebi. For Jeeravan Masala In a pan, add fennel seeds, cumin seeds, coriander seeds and dry roast it for a minute on low flame. Add black peppercorns, cloves, mace, cinnamon stick, bay leaf, green cardamom, dry red chillies, nutmeg, salt to taste and dry roast it well. Add pink salt, dry ginger powder, turmeric powder, asafoetida and toss on low flame. Transfer it to a plate or tray to cool down at room temperature. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. For Masala Peanuts In a pan, heat oil, add peanuts and roast for 2-3 minutes on moderate heat until golden in color. Transfer it to a bowl and strain the excess oil. Sprinkle some degi red chili powder, salt to taste and toss it well. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #indoripoharecipe #poherecipe #ranveerbrar #indorejaisepohe #kandepohe #aloopoha #nashtarecipe #howtomakepoha

description: CHICKEN SHAWARMA - Shawarma sounds exotic and reminds you of Central Asian street food, right? Today let's try a Street style, desi Shawarma. You can make this with Paneer or Potato too as a veg option *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 1 tsp Oil, तेल | 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | A pinch of coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | ¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर | ¼ tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला | ½ tsp Dry mango powder, अमचूर पाउडर | 1 cup Mayonnaise, मेयोनिज | 2 cups Refined flour, मैदा | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 tsp Oil, तेल | 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही | ¼ cup Water, पानी | 2 tsp Oil (after kneading) तेल | 2 medium Beetroot (peeled & batons) चुकंदर | 1 no. Garlic cloves, grated, लहसुन | ⅓ cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही | ¼ cup Mayonnaise, मेयोनिज | 1 ½ tsp Oregano, ओरिगैनो | 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ½ tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस | 300 gms Chicken breast, चिकन | ½ tbsp Oil, तेल | 2 tbsp Tandoori Mayonnaise, तंदूरी मेयोनिज | 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, roughly torn, धनिया पत्ता | 1 tsp Oil, तेल | ¼ tsp white Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल | ½ tsp Oil (for roasting roti) तेल | 1 ½ tbsp Oil (for searing chicken) तेल | Prepared Roti, रोटी | 1 tbsp Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही | Prepared Salad, कचुम्बर
instructions: For Tandoori Mayonnaise | In a pan, add turmeric powder, oil and roast it for 10-15 seconds. | Add degi red chili powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, garam masala and mix it well. | Add dry mango powder and cook for a few seconds. | Transfer it to a bowl, add mayonnaise and mix it well. | Keep it aside for further use. | In a bowl, add refined flour, salt to taste, oil, curd, water and knead it into a semi soft dough. | Apply oil and keep it aside for 10-15 minutes to rest. | Divide the dough into lemon size balls, apply oil and flatten the dough with the help of a rolling pin. | Make a semi thick roti and add white sesame seeds. | In a tawa, heat oil, place prepared roti and cook it well on both the sides. | Transfer it to a plate and keep it aside for further use. | In a bowl, add beetroot, green chillies, salt to taste, onion, vinegar and mix it well. | Keep it aside for further use. | For Chicken Marination | In a bowl, add garlic, hung curd, mayonnaise, oregano, degi red chili powder, salt to taste, lemon juice, chicken breast and mix it well. | Keep it aside for 10-15 minutes to marinate. | For Sauteing Chicken | In a grilled pan, heat oil, place marinated chicken and sear it for 5-6 minutes on both sides. | Transfer it to a plate and cut the chicken into strips. | In a pan, heat oil, add onion, seared chicken and saute it for 5-6 minutes on high flame. | Add tandoori mayonnaise, coriander leaves and toss it well. | Keep it aside for further use. | For Assembling | Take the prepared shawarma roti, apply hung curd, tandoori mayonnaise and spread evenly. | Place prepared salad, sauteed chicken and roll it. | Serve hot with prepared dip. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - raw_text: CHICKEN SHAWARMA - Shawarma sounds exotic and reminds you of Central Asian street food, right? Today let's try a Street style, desi Shawarma. You can make this with Paneer or Potato too as a veg option *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼 - https://bit.ly/RollsnWrapsbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** CHICKEN SHAWARMA Preparation time 5-10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2 Ingredients For Tandoori Mayonnaise ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर ¼ tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला ½ tsp Dry mango powder, अमचूर पाउडर 1 cup Mayonnaise, मेयोनिज For Dough 2 cups Refined flour, मैदा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tsp Oil, तेल 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही ¼ cup Water, पानी 2 tsp Oil (after kneading) तेल For Salad 2 medium Beetroot (peeled & batons) चुकंदर 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & sliced) हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 medium Onion, sliced, प्याज 2 tbsp Vinegar, सिरका For Chicken Marination 2-4 no. Garlic cloves, grated, लहसुन ⅓ cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही ¼ cup Mayonnaise, मेयोनिज 1 ½ tsp Oregano, ओरिगैनो 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 300 gms Chicken breast, चिकन For Sauteing Chicken ½ tbsp Oil, तेल ½ Onion, sliced, प्याज Seared Chicken, cut into strips, भुना हुआ चिकन 2 tbsp Tandoori Mayonnaise, तंदूरी मेयोनिज 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, roughly torn, धनिया पत्ता Other Ingredients 1 tsp Oil, तेल ¼ tsp white Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल ½ tsp Oil (for roasting roti) तेल 1 ½ tbsp Oil (for searing chicken) तेल For Assembling Prepared Roti, रोटी 1 tbsp Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही Tandoori Mayonnaise, तंदूरी मेयोनिज Prepared Salad, कचुम्बर Sauteed Chicken, पका हुआ चिकन Process For Tandoori Mayonnaise In a pan, add turmeric powder, oil and roast it for 10-15 seconds. Add degi red chili powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, garam masala and mix it well. Add dry mango powder and cook for a few seconds. Transfer it to a bowl, add mayonnaise and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Dough In a bowl, add refined flour, salt to taste, oil, curd, water and knead it into a semi soft dough. Apply oil and keep it aside for 10-15 minutes to rest. Divide the dough into lemon size balls, apply oil and flatten the dough with the help of a rolling pin. Make a semi thick roti and add white sesame seeds. In a tawa, heat oil, place prepared roti and cook it well on both the sides. Transfer it to a plate and keep it aside for further use. For Salad In a bowl, add beetroot, green chillies, salt to taste, onion, vinegar and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Marination In a bowl, add garlic, hung curd, mayonnaise, oregano, degi red chili powder, salt to taste, lemon juice, chicken breast and mix it well. Keep it aside for 10-15 minutes to marinate. For Sauteing Chicken In a grilled pan, heat oil, place marinated chicken and sear it for 5-6 minutes on both sides. Transfer it to a plate and cut the chicken into strips. In a pan, heat oil, add onion, seared chicken and saute it for 5-6 minutes on high flame. Add tandoori mayonnaise, coriander leaves and toss it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Assembling Take the prepared shawarma roti, apply hung curd, tandoori mayonnaise and spread evenly. Place prepared salad, sauteed chicken and roll it. Serve hot with prepared dip. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickenshawarma #chickentikka #ranveerbrar #kathirolls #kolkataeggroll #chickenkathiroll #chickenrecipe

title: Healthy Kadhi Pakoda | बाजरे की पकोड़ा कढ़ी | Monsoon Spl healthy Millet Recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: BAJRA KADHI PAKODA- Celebrating the International Year of Millets, here is my favourite recipe - Pakora and Kadhi with Bajra. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही | 2 cups Water, पानी | Salt to taste, नमकस्वादअनुसार | ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग | A pinch of degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 tbsp Bajra flour, बाजरे का आटा | 2 ½ tbsp Ghee, घी | ¼ cup Water, पानी | ½ tbsp Ghee, घी | 1 cup Bajra flour, बाजरे का आटा | 3 medium Onions, sliced, प्याज | ¼ cup Carom leaves, roughly torn, अजवाइन के पत्ते | 3 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही | Salt to taste, नमकस्वादअनुसार | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | ¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग | ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ | ½ cup Roasted Bajra flour, बाजरे का आटा | 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही | ½ tsp Oil, तेल | 2-3 tbsp Jowar, ज्वार
instructions: In a bowl, add curd, water, salt to taste, sugar, turmeric powder, asafoetida, degi red chili powder, bajra flour, ghee and mix it well. | Transfer the mixture in a saucepan or kadai and cook it for 15-18 minutes or until thick at low flame. | Add fried pakora, water and give a quick boil on medium flame. | Finish it with some ghee and transfer it to a serving bowl. | Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot with steam rice. | For Roasting Flour | In a pan, add bajra flour and roast it for 4-5 minutes on medium flame. | Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. | In a bowl, add onions, carom leaves, curd, ginger, salt to taste, turmeric powder, asafoetida, degi red chili powder, fennel seeds, bajra flour and mix it well. | In a kadai, heat oil, take lemon size mixture and drop it into hot oil. | Fry it for 4-5 minutes until half cooked and transfer it to an absorbent sheet. | Refry the pakoda for 2-3 minutes until golden brown and crispy. | Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. | For Jowar Popcorn | In a pan, heat oil, add jowar and cover it with the lid. | let it puff for 3-4 minutes on medium flame. | Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
raw_text: BAJRA KADHI PAKODA- Celebrating the International Year of Millets, here is my favourite recipe - Pakora and Kadhi with Bajra. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: VRAT RECIPES - https://bit.ly/VratRecipesbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** MILLET PAKODA KADHI Preparation time 5-10 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2 Ingredients For Kadhi 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही 2 cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमकस्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग A pinch of degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Bajra flour, बाजरे का आटा 2 ½ tbsp Ghee, घी Fried Pakora, तले हुए पकौड़े ¼ cup Water, पानी ½ tbsp Ghee, घी For Roasting Flour 1 cup Bajra flour, बाजरे का आटा For Pakoda 3 medium Onions, sliced, प्याज ¼ cup Carom leaves, roughly torn, अजवाइन के पत्ते 3 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही ½ inch Ginger (peeled & grated) अदरक Salt to taste, नमकस्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ ½ cup Roasted Bajra flour, बाजरे का आटा 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Jowar Popcorn ½ tsp Oil, तेल 2-3 tbsp Jowar, ज्वार For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Kadhi In a bowl, add curd, water, salt to taste, sugar, turmeric powder, asafoetida, degi red chili powder, bajra flour, ghee and mix it well. Transfer the mixture in a saucepan or kadai and cook it for 15-18 minutes or until thick at low flame. Add fried pakora, water and give a quick boil on medium flame. Finish it with some ghee and transfer it to a serving bowl. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot with steam rice. For Roasting Flour In a pan, add bajra flour and roast it for 4-5 minutes on medium flame. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Pakoda In a bowl, add onions, carom leaves, curd, ginger, salt to taste, turmeric powder, asafoetida, degi red chili powder, fennel seeds, bajra flour and mix it well. In a kadai, heat oil, take lemon size mixture and drop it into hot oil. Fry it for 4-5 minutes until half cooked and transfer it to an absorbent sheet. Refry the pakoda for 2-3 minutes until golden brown and crispy. Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Jowar Popcorn In a pan, heat oil, add jowar and cover it with the lid. let it puff for 3-4 minutes on medium flame. Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #pakodakadhi #milletrecipes #ranveerbrar #bajrekepakode #milletkadhi #bajrekikadhi #jowarpopcorn #jowarrecipes #bajrarecipes #vratrecipes
